I will write about Tetradenia and Tetractinella  and Tetractinella  synonym and  Tetradenia synonym of Tetractinella. Tetractinella (or Tetradenia) is a plant genus in the family Lamiaceae.

Tetractinella (or Tetradenia) is a plant with a definition:  it is a plant with leaves and flowers. 

The health benefits of Tetradenia (or Tetractinella) include its traditional use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic. 

The bioactive constituents of Tetradenia (or Tetractinella) include essential oils and flavonoids, with the main flavonoids being flavonol glycosides and flavanones.

The most common herbal preparations made with Tetradenia (or Tetractinella) include tea infusions, essential oils, and extracts used in traditional medicine for their antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
taxonomy: Tetrathylacium pacificum is classified within the family Zygophyllaceae. This family is commonly known as the jujube or creosote bush family. The order of classification for Tetrathylacium pacificum is Sapindales. It belongs to the class Magnoliopsida, which is a subclass of flowering plants. Tetrathylacium pacificum is also known to be native to the Pacific region.
